languages.text: "Это безумие. Ты собственными руками уничтожишь индустриальный мир!"

traits.locale_text: "Это безумие. Ты собственными руками уничтожишь мир-завод!"
"Это безумие. Ты собственными руками уничтожишь индустриальный мир!"

languages.text: "This is madness. You will destroy the industrial world by your own hand!"
languages.original_text: "Это безумие. Ты собственными руками уничтожишь индустриальный мир!"

traits.locale_text: "This is madness. You will destroy the forge world by your own hand!"
"This is madness. You will destroy the forge world by your own hand!"
"This is madness. You will destroy the industrial world by your own hand!"
"This is madness. You will destroy the industrial world by your own hand!"
"This is madness. You will destroy the industrial world by your own hand!"

languages.text: "Das ist Wahnsinn. Sie werden die industrielle Welt eigenhändig zerstören!"
languages.original_text: "This is madness. You will destroy the industrial world by your own hand!"

traits.locale_text: "Das ist Wahnsinn. Sie werden die industrielle Welt eigenhändig zerstören!"

languages.text: "C'est de la folie. Vous allez détruire le monde industriel de votre propre main !"
languages.original_text: "This is madness. You will destroy the industrial world by your own hand!"

traits.locale_text: "C'est de la folie. Vous allez détruire le monde industriel de votre propre main !"

languages.text: "Esto es una locura. ¡Destruirás el mundo industrial por tu propia mano!"
languages.original_text: "This is madness. You will destroy the industrial world by your own hand!"

traits.locale_text: "Esto es una locura. ¡Destruirás el mundo industrial por tu propia mano!"

languages.text: "Bu çılgınlık. Endüstriyel dünyayı kendi elinizle yok edeceksiniz!"
languages.original_text: "This is madness. You will destroy the industrial world by your own hand!"

traits.locale_text: "Bu çılgınlık. Endüstriyel dünyayı kendi elinizle yok edeceksiniz!"
